name: zhipu
description: Zhipu AI GLM models. Set ZHIPU_BASE_URL to override the default endpoint (e.g. https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/coding/paas/v4 for Coding Plan models).

env_vars.name: ZHIPU_BASE_URL
env_vars.description: Zhipu API base URL. Change to https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/coding/paas/v4 for Coding Plan models like GLM-5.1.
